seoTitle: Hampton vs Hanging Rock — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hampton and Hanging Rock. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hampton vs Hanging Rock: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hampton and Hanging Rock.
heading: Hampton vs Hanging Rock — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hampton, New South Wales and Hanging Rock, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hampton has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Hanging Rock (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hampton or Hanging Rock safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hampton has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Hanging Rock scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hampton scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Hanging Rock scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hampton or Hanging Rock?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hampton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
